problem: Skilled nursing facility (SNF) residents, including those with chronic kidney disease, experience high hospitalization rates due to limited access to specialists and after-hours clinical resources, leading to poor outcomes and avoidable costs
solution: Digital health platform enabling telemedicine consultations and workflow optimization for SNFs. Provides enhanced provider accessibility, seamless connectivity for remote visits, two-way patient data access, and streamlined documentation. Reduces hospitalizations, improves patient outcomes, and optimizes PDPM revenue capture for nursing facilities
